---
title: "Analysis of Waiting Times and Opposite‑Direction Buses Across Peak Periods"
output: html_document
---


<script src="https://code.jquery.com/jquery-3.7.1.min.js" integrity="sha256-/JqT3SQfawRcv/BIHPThkBvs0OEvtFFmqPF/lYI/Cxo=" crossorigin="anonymous"></script>

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, error=FALSE)

 

library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(stringr)
# Force English weekday names
Sys.setlocale("LC_TIME", "C")

# 1. Read data
logged_data <- read_csv("https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vQG3iHTYcFJaPBsncTtATK35WDj0nYos1ZubJcnFGp-Tm-vqKYHmCNFLfCmB32nFe2Sx9OOCCS3BrA-/pub?gid=1301837894&single=true&output=csv")

# 2. Rename and clean
latest_data <- logged_data %>%
  rename(
    Timestamp          = Timestamp,
    observation_period = `1. Observation Period`,
    waiting_time       = `2. Waiting Time (minutes)`,
    opposite_buses     = `3.Number of Opposite‑Direction 70 Buses Observed`
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Timestamp = dmy_hms(Timestamp),
    date      = as_date(Timestamp),
    weekday   = wday(date, label = TRUE, week_start = 1),
    period_clean = case_when(
      str_detect(observation_period, "Morning") ~ "Morning",
      str_detect(observation_period, "Afternoon") ~ "Afternoon",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    ),
    waiting_time   = as.numeric(waiting_time),
    opposite_buses = as.numeric(opposite_buses)
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(Timestamp)) %>%
  slice(1:42)  

# 3. Weekday summary (now works because opposite_buses is numeric)
daily_weekday_summary <- latest_data %>%
  group_by(weekday) %>%
  summarise(
    avg_waiting_time   = mean(waiting_time, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_opposite_buses = sum(opposite_buses, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_observations     = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(day_type = if_else(weekday %in% c("Sat", "Sun"), "Weekend", "Weekday")) %>%
  arrange(weekday)

# 4. Period summary
period_summary <- latest_data %>%
  group_by(period_clean) %>%
  summarise(
    total_wait          = sum(waiting_time, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_wait            = mean(waiting_time, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_opposite_buses = sum(opposite_buses, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# 5. Color palette
cb_palette <- c("#66c2a5", "#fc8d62", "#8da0cb", "#e78ac3", "#a6d854", "#ffd92f", "#e5c494")

# Plot 1: Line plot
plot1 <- ggplot(daily_weekday_summary, aes(x = weekday, y = avg_waiting_time, group = 1)) +
  geom_line(color = cb_palette[1], linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(aes(color = day_type), size = 4) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(cb_palette[4], cb_palette[5])) +
  labs(title = "Average waiting time by weekday", x = "Weekday",
       y = "Average waiting time (minutes)", color = "Day type") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
ggsave("plot1.png", plot1, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)

# Plot 2: Bar plot
plot2 <- ggplot(period_summary, aes(x = period_clean, y = total_wait, fill = period_clean)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.6) +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(total_wait, 1)), vjust = -0.5, size = 4) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cb_palette[1:2]) +
  labs(title = "Total waiting time by time of day", x = "Observation period",
       y = "Total waiting time (minutes)") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
ggsave("plot2.png", plot2, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)

# Plot 3: Boxplot + jitter
plot3 <- ggplot(latest_data, aes(x = weekday, y = waiting_time, fill = weekday)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7, outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0, alpha = 0.4, size = 1.5, color = "gray30") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cb_palette, guide = "none") +
  labs(title = "Waiting time distribution by weekday", x = "Weekday",
       y = "Waiting time (minutes)") +
  theme_minimal()
ggsave("plot3.png", plot3, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```

```{js}
$(function() {
  $(".level2").css('visibility', 'hidden');
  $(".level2").first().css('visibility', 'visible');
  $(".container-fluid").height($(".container-fluid").height() + 300);
  $(window).on('scroll', function() {
    $('h2').each(function() {
      var h2Top = $(this).offset().top - $(window).scrollTop();
      var windowHeight = $(window).height();
      if (h2Top >= 0 && h2Top <= windowHeight / 2) {
        $(this).parent('div').css('visibility', 'visible');
      } else if (h2Top > windowHeight / 2) {
        $(this).parent('div').css('visibility', 'hidden');
      }
    });
  });
})
```

```{css}
.figcaption {display: none}
```

## Introduction

Our dataset contains `r nrow(latest_data)` bus waiting time observations collected 
`r if(!all(is.na(latest_data$date))) paste0("between ", format(min(latest_data$date, na.rm = TRUE), "%B %d"), " and ", format(max(latest_data$date, na.rm = TRUE), "%B %d")) else "on unknown dates"`.  
The analysis focuses on two key metrics: **Daily Patterns** and **Waiting Time by Observation Period**.

### Average waiting time by weekday

![plot1](plot1.png)


- **Best service (lowest average waiting time)** happens on **`r daily_weekday_summary$weekday[which.min(daily_weekday_summary$avg_waiting_time)]`** 
  with `r min(daily_weekday_summary$avg_waiting_time)` minutes average wait
  
- **Worst service (highest average waiting time)** occurs on **`r daily_weekday_summary$weekday[which.max(daily_weekday_summary$avg_waiting_time)]`** 
  with `r max(daily_weekday_summary$avg_waiting_time)` minutes average wait
  
  
### Total waiting time by time of day

![plot2](plot2.png)

- **Lowest total waiting time**: `r period_summary$period_clean[which.min(period_summary$total_wait)]` period  
  (`r round(min(period_summary$total_wait), 1)` minutes)
  
- **Highest total waiting time**: `r period_summary$period_clean[which.max(period_summary$total_wait)]` period  
  (`r round(max(period_summary$total_wait), 1)` minutes)

### Waiting time distribution by weekday

![plot3](plot3.png)


### Combined Bus Daily Pattern Analysis

Key insights from Combined Bus Daily Pattern analyzed categories:

- **Day with highest average waiting time**: `r daily_weekday_summary$weekday[which.max(daily_weekday_summary$avg_waiting_time)]`  
  (`r round(max(daily_weekday_summary$avg_waiting_time), 1)` minutes)

- **Period with highest average waiting time**: `r period_summary$period_clean[which.max(period_summary$avg_wait)]`  
  (`r round(max(period_summary$avg_wait), 1)` minutes)

- **Period with lowest average waiting time**: `r period_summary$period_clean[which.min(period_summary$avg_wait)]`  
  (`r round(min(period_summary$avg_wait), 1)` minutes)
